componentResponsibilities: ControlledActionRuntimeReportDashboard: top-level composition component that receives view model, controls selected panel, and selects full/compact/ascii fallback display
RuntimeReportHeader: title and read-only approval/execution/recording flags
RuntimeReportStatusStrip: compact row of major safety flags
RuntimeReportNavigation: renders navigation targets and sends selected panel callback
ActiveRouteCard: route id, class, risk, status
BlockedCapabilitiesCard: blocked capability rows for execute/write/bridge/direct_source/automatic takeover/package publish
NextSafeStepCard: recommended next safe step and boundary reminders
viewModelAdapterPlan: ensure blocked capabilities are always present
ensure invalid or missing panel never crashes UI
ensure ASCII fallback is available when asciiReport exists
implementationOrder: Add smoke test that renders/validates component exports or static structure.
safetyRules: must never imply execution is available
must never imply approval has been granted
must never imply live recording occurred
must never imply direct_source is enabled
must never imply automatic takeover is enabled
must never imply write actions are enabled
must never imply bridge actions are enabled
every UI state must preserve executionPerformed=false
every UI state must preserve approvalGranted=false
every UI state must preserve recordingPerformed=false
every UI state must preserve liveDecisionRecorded=false
liveProofCaveats: live CLI invocation proof remains not_available_from_current_cli_surface
do not claim generic OpenClaw plugin.tools.call proof
plan is based on source validation and installed-file-level verification
